function.name: tailscale.status
function.description: Get the current Tailscale network status including connection state and IP addresses

function.name: tailscale.list_devices
function.description: List all devices on the Tailscale network with their hostnames, IPs, and online status

online_only.description: Only show currently online devices (default: false)

function.name: tailscale.ping
function.description: Ping a device on the Tailscale network to check connectivity and latency

hostname.description: Tailscale hostname or IP to ping

function.name: tailscale.send_file
function.description: Send a file to another device on the Tailscale network using Taildrop

hostname.description: Tailscale hostname or IP of the target device
